revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from other disambiguation
  |name=From other disambiguation
  |from=a title with an alternative disambiguation qualifier of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=** The disambiguation of these page names is not '''incorrect''', '''incomplete''' nor '''unnecessary'''.  For those redirects use {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}, {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} or {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}} ''instead''.
  |all category=Redirects from other disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing from wikipedia

  |info=** The disambiguation of these page names is not '''incorrect''', '''incomplete''' nor '''unnecessary'''.  For those redirects use {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}, {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} or {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}} ''instead''.
  |all category=Redirects from other disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>

</noinclude>{{Redirect template

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from other disambiguation
  |name=From other disambiguation
  |from=a title with an alternative disambiguation qualifier of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from other disambiguation |name=From other disambiguation |from=a title with an alternative disambiguation qualifier of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=** The disambiguation of these page names is not '''incorrect''', '''incomplete''' nor '''unnecessary'''. For those redirects use {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}, {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} or {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from other disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from other disambiguation |name=From other disambiguation |from=a title with an alternative disambiguation qualifier of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}} |info=** The disambiguation of these page names is not '''incorrect''', '''incomplete''' nor '''unnecessary'''. For those redirects use {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}, {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} or {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}} ''instead''. |all category=Redirects from other disambiguation |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from other disambiguation
  |name=From other disambiguation
  |from=a title with an alternative disambiguation qualifier of {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|'''{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}}}'''|'''{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}'''}}|the target name}}
  |info=** The disambiguation of these page names is not '''incorrect''', '''incomplete''' nor '''unnecessary'''.  For those redirects use {{tl|R from incorrect disambiguation}}, {{tl|R from incomplete disambiguation}} or {{tl|R from unnecessary disambiguation}} ''instead''.
  |all category=Redirects from other disambiguation
  |printworthy={{#if:{{{printworthy|}}}|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>
